## Fixes

- **A meeting you already ended can no longer interfere with the next one.** If the transcription service happened to fail while an ended meeting was still wrapping up in the background, that late failure could stop a newly started meeting or show a misleading error message. Late failures from ended meetings are now silently logged instead.
- **Internal reliability: event listeners can no longer be duplicated.** Fixed a rare timing issue where the dictation overlay could end up reacting twice to every update.
